## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are on a separate branch; merging into `main` is via this PR (no direct commits).
- [ ] CI is green; automated reviewers (Sonar/CodeRabbit/dependabot) findings have been addressed.
- [ ] Build is green; lint/format pass (`cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`,
      `cargo fmt --all`).
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`cargo test --workspace`).
- [ ] Documentation and `CHANGELOG.md` updated if behavior, build/run, or API/CLI changed.
- [ ] Security-sensitive areas (auth, payments, data handling) reviewed, if touched.
- [ ] Meets the project's Definition of Done.
